mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deceased_data (name, gender, age, personality, deceased_nickname, user_nickname, relationship, speaking_tone) VALUES ( #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{personality}, #{deceasedNickname}, #{userNickname}, #{relationship}, #{speakingTone} )
mapper.select: SELECT sub.subscription_code AS subscriptionCode, d.deceased_name AS name, c.content AS content, c.message_time AS messageTime FROM subscription sub JOIN service s ON s.code = sub.service_code LEFT JOIN deceased_data d ON d.deceased_code = sub.deceased_code LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT content, message_time FROM contents WHERE subscription_code = sub.subscription_code ORDER BY message_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) c ON true WHERE sub.user_code = #{userCode} AND s.service_name = 'sms'
SELECT role, content, message_time AS messageTime FROM contents WHERE subscription_code = #{subscriptionCode} ORDER BY message_time DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscription sub JOIN service s ON s.code = sub.service_code WHERE sub.user_code = #{userCode} AND s.service_name = 'sms'
